en: Afterward Moses and Aaron went and said to Pharaoh, "Thus says the LORD, the God of Israel, 'Let my people go, that they may hold a feast to me in the wilderness.'"
zh: 後來，摩西和亞倫去對法老說：“耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：讓我的人民離開這裡，叫他們可以在曠野向我守節。”

en: But Pharaoh said, "Who is the LORD, that I should obey his voice and let Israel go? I do not know the LORD, and moreover, I will not let Israel go."
zh: 法老回答：“耶和華是誰，我要聽他的話，讓以色列人離開呢？我不認識耶和華，也不讓以色列人離開。”

en: Then they said, "The God of the Hebrews has met with us. Please let us go a three days' journey into the wilderness that we may sacrifice to the LORD our God, lest he fall upon us with pestilence or with the sword."
zh: 他們說：“希伯來人的 神遇見了我們；求你讓我們走三天的路程到曠野去，獻祭給耶和華我們的 神，免得他用瘟疫或刀劍擊殺我們。”

en: But the king of Egypt said to them, "Moses and Aaron, why do you take the people away from their work? Get back to your burdens."
zh: 埃及王對他們說：“摩西、亞倫哪，你們為甚麼使人民懶惰不作工呢？去挑你們的擔子吧。”

en: And Pharaoh said, "Behold, the people of the land are now many, and you make them rest from their burdens!"
zh: 法老又說：“你看，現在這地的民很多，你們竟叫他們歇下擔子？”

en: The same day Pharaoh commanded the taskmasters of the people and their foremen,
zh: 就在那天，法老吩咐眾民的督工和首領說：

en: "You shall no longer give the people straw to make bricks, as in the past; let them go and gather straw for themselves.
zh: “你們不要像往日一樣再把草給人民做磚，叫他們自己去撿草。

en: But the number of bricks that they made in the past you shall impose on them, you shall by no means reduce it, for they are idle. Therefore they cry, 'Let us go and offer sacrifice to our God.'
zh: 他們往日做磚的數量，你們還是向他們要，一點也不可減少，因為他們是懶惰的，所以他們才呼喊說：‘讓我們去獻祭給我們的 神。’

en: Let heavier work be laid on the men that they may labor at it and pay no regard to lying words."
zh: 你們要把更重的工作加在這些人的身上，好使他們專心作工，不聽謊言。”

en: So the taskmasters and the foremen of the people went out and said to the people, "Thus says Pharaoh, 'I will not give you straw.
zh: 眾民的督工和首領出來，告訴人民說：“法老這樣說：‘我不再給你們草。

en: Go and get your straw yourselves wherever you can find it, but your work will not be reduced in the least.'"
zh: 你們自己能在哪裡找到草，就到哪裡去撿吧，但你們的工作一點也不可減少。’”

en: So the people were scattered throughout all the land of Egypt to gather stubble for straw.
zh: 於是，人民就分散到埃及全地，去拾禾稭作草。

en: The taskmasters were urgent, saying, "Complete your work, your daily task each day, as when there was straw."
zh: 督工們催著說：“你們的工作，每天的本分，要在當天完成，像以前有草的時候一樣。”

en: And the foremen of the people of Israel, whom Pharaoh's taskmasters had set over them, were beaten and were asked, "Why have you not done all your task of making bricks today and yesterday, as in the past?"
zh: 法老的督工責打他們派定的以色列人的首領，說：“你們昨天今天為甚麼沒有做完指定要你們做的磚，像往日一樣呢？”

en: Then the foremen of the people of Israel came and cried to Pharaoh, "Why do you treat your servants like this?
zh: 以色列人的首領就來，向法老呼求說：“你為甚麼這樣待你的僕人呢？

en: No straw is given to your servants, yet they say to us, 'Make bricks!' And behold, your servants are beaten; but the fault is in your own people."
zh: 沒有草給你的僕人，但他們對我們說：‘你們做磚吧！’看哪，你的僕人受了責打，其實這是你自己人民的錯。”

en: But he said, "You are idle, you are idle; that is why you say, 'Let us go and sacrifice to the LORD.'
zh: 法老說：“你們確實是懶惰的，所以你們才說：‘讓我們去獻祭給耶和華。’

en: Go now and work. No straw will be given you, but you must still deliver the same number of bricks."
zh: 現在你們去作工吧；草是不給你們的，磚卻要如數交上。”

en: The foremen of the people of Israel saw that they were in trouble when they said, "You shall by no means reduce your number of bricks, your daily task each day."
zh: 以色列人的首領因有命令說：“你們每天本分要做的磚數不可減少”，就知道自己有禍了。

en: They met Moses and Aaron, who were waiting for them, as they came out from Pharaoh;
zh: 他們從法老那裡出來的時候，遇見摩西和亞倫，正在站著等候他們，

en: and they said to them, "The LORD look on you and judge, because you have made us stink in the sight of Pharaoh and his servants, and have put a sword in their hand to kill us."
zh: 就對他們說：“願耶和華鑒察你們，審判你們，因為你們使我們的香氣在法老眼前和他的臣僕眼前都發臭了，把刀放在他們的手裡來殺我們。”

en: Then Moses turned to the LORD and said, "O LORD, why have you done evil to this people? Why did you ever send me?
zh: 摩西回到耶和華那裡，說：“主啊！你為甚麼苦待這人民呢？為甚麼差派我呢？

en: For since I came to Pharaoh to speak in your name, he has done evil to this people, and you have not delivered your people at all."
zh: 自從我到法老那裡，奉你的名說話以來，他就苦待這人民，你一點也沒有拯救你自己的人民。”
